summary: Senior Observability, Monitoring, and Telemetry Engineer with 20+ years of enterprise IT experience across APM platforms, logging/monitoring workflows, telemetry analytics, production support, Python/Bash-style automation, runbooks, and operational documentation. Deep hands-on background with Dynatrace AppMon/Synthetics, CA APM/Introscope, BMC TrueSight/TSCO, AppDynamics, transaction tracing, dashboards, alert thresholds, data extraction, troubleshooting, and enterprise monitoring operations. Strongest production tools are APM and telemetry analytics platforms, with adjacent learning/awareness in Cribl, Elastic/OpenSearch, Corelight/NDR, and security telemetry pipelines.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Built and supported telemetry data pipelines that ingested operational data from 6,000+ infrastructure endpoints into curated datasets for monitoring, capacity analytics, forecasting, and executive reporting.

Integrated operational telemetry from BMC TrueSight/TSCO, CA APM/Wily, AppDynamics, and infrastructure sources into unified reporting layers used by engineering, operations, and leadership stakeholders.
Developed Python, SQL, Pandas, and PySpark-oriented automation for data extraction, validation, reconciliation, exception handling, recurring reporting, and production support workflows.
Troubleshot missing, inconsistent, or delayed telemetry by tracing source feeds, transformation logic, SQL behavior, reporting defects, and downstream consumer expectations.
Created operational reports, runbooks, data dictionaries, documentation, and dashboard narratives to support incident review, troubleshooting, capacity monitoring, and knowledge sharing.
Used monitoring and capacity data to identify infrastructure hotspots, underutilized systems, performance risks, and operational improvement opportunities.
Applied regulated enterprise practices around access controls, auditability, data retention, secure handling, documentation, and production support.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon and Gomez Synthetic Monitoring for Brand.com and critical hospitality systems, improving visibility into web and mobile performance.
Implemented End User Monitoring and end-to-end transaction tracing to expose user-experience issues, application dependencies, and performance bottlenecks.
Led the FAST project, mining real-user and synthetic performance telemetry to surface optimization recommendations adopted by engineering teams.
Upgraded Dynatrace from 6.5 to 7.0 and enforced TLS 1.2 security while maintaining production monitoring continuity.
Integrated HP Performance Center with Dynatrace to correlate load-test behavior with APM telemetry and support performance engineering decisions.
Maintained monitoring documentation and supported production troubleshooting across application and infrastructure teams.

experience.title: Senior Consultant / CA APM SME
bullets: Served as CA APM SME for a regulated financial-services environment with 50+ Enterprise Managers and 4,000–6,000 instrumented agents.
Designed dashboards, alerts, SLA thresholds, management modules, and reporting standards adopted across enterprise monitoring environments.
Built Perl/Korn Shell and SQL-driven extraction scripts that automated recurring telemetry reporting and replaced manual weekly exports.
Partnered with J2EE/WebLogic, middleware, database, and operations teams to diagnose bottlenecks using APM telemetry, transaction traces, and production evidence.
Delivered monitoring onboarding guidance, operational documentation, technical training, and knowledge-sharing materials for application and support teams.

experience.title: Performance Test Engineer
bullets: Analyzed J2EE telecom web applications under load to identify throughput limits, thread contention, JDBC constraints, heap pressure, CPU usage, and garbage-collection risks.
Installed and configured JMX monitoring, Wily Introscope, and thread dump automation scripts for real-time visibility during performance tests.
Documented performance baselines, regression thresholds, and release-readiness evidence used by engineering teams.

education.degree: Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Observability / APM: Dynatrace AppMon, Gomez Synthetic Monitoring, CA APM / Introscope, CA CEM, CA ADA, BMC TrueSight / TSCO, AppDynamics, JMX Monitoring, EUM/RUM, transaction tracing, synthetic monitoring
skills.Logging & Telemetry Operations: Telemetry pipelines, log/metric/trace-style data, log onboarding concepts, data routing concepts, filtering/transformation concepts, parsing troubleshooting, ingestion validation, pipeline health checks
skills.Monitoring Operations: Dashboards, alert thresholds, SLA thresholds, capacity monitoring, platform maintenance, configuration updates, operational documentation, runbooks, escalation support, production troubleshooting
skills.Automation & Scripting: Python, SQL, Perl, Korn Shell, Bash concepts, Pandas, PySpark, automation scripts, data extraction, validation, reconciliation, reporting automation
skills.Security Telemetry Adjacent: Security operations awareness, NDR/Corelight concepts, Elastic/OpenSearch concepts, SIEM/SOAR awareness, cybersecurity documentation, access-control awareness, regulated data handling
skills.Systems: Linux/Unix, Windows fundamentals, WebLogic/WebSphere, J2EE monitoring, middleware troubleshooting, database-adjacent performance analysis, hybrid enterprise environments
skills.Data Engineering: ETL/ELT, data quality, schema design, operational analytics, telemetry normalization concepts, enrichment concepts, reporting datasets, root-cause analysis
skills.Cloud & Tools: AWS S3, AWS Glue, Athena, Redshift, EC2, ECS, CloudWatch concepts, Git/GitHub workflows, CI/CD concepts, Agile/Scrum/Kanban
skills.Adjacent / Learning: Cribl concepts, Elastic/Elasticsearch/OpenSearch concepts, Corelight/NDR awareness, Vector concepts, Kafka/MSK awareness, OpenTelemetry concepts

projects.name: Observability and APM Telemetry Analytics
projects.description: Built and supported monitoring dashboards, telemetry extraction scripts, transaction tracing workflows, alert thresholds, and operational reports across Dynatrace, CA APM, BMC TrueSight, and AppDynamics environments.

projects.name: HorizonScale — Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Built a capacity forecasting platform that transformed infrastructure telemetry into curated datasets, Prophet/scikit-learn forecasts, capacity-risk indicators, dashboards, and stakeholder reports for proactive resource planning.

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform on AWS
projects.description: Designed a serverless data platform using S3, Glue, Athena, Redshift, Parquet, and PySpark-oriented processing patterns to support curated analytics, query optimization, and reliable downstream reporting.
